stories.title: 明天的茶
stories.description: A magical teapot that reveals alternate life paths with each sip, teaching the value of choices made.

stories.title: 书法家的选择
stories.description: A Song Dynasty calligrapher must choose between wealth and artistic integrity.

stories.title: 记忆茶馆
stories.description: A mysterious teahouse where different teas transform memories, teaching the value of preserving them unchanged.

stories.title: 奶奶玩网络
stories.description: A 70-year-old grandmother learns to use a smartphone with hilarious results and unexpected viral success.

stories.title: 公园观察者
stories.description: A writer discovers profound meaning in observing ordinary daily life at the local park.
